You can select up to 4 tickets with this discount pass and children under 3 are free. For Tickets: www.bostonharborislands.org/ferry-tickets/ Select a date to visit Georges Island, Spectacle Isl

coupon.source_phrase_block: Use the library pass code when ordering your tickets and receive 50% off each ticket! You can select up to 4 tickets with this discount pass and children under 3 are free. For Tickets: www.bostonharborislands.org/ferry-tickets/ Select a date to visit Georges Island, Spectacle Island, or Paddocks Island from Hingham Select up to 4 tickets then continue to Booking Details Enter the library's unique code found printed on the pass in the "Coupon/Voucher Code" field and click apply Complete your transaction & bring your phone or printed copy of your barcode to board the ferry
